name: STL Validator (Binary + ASCII)
description: Validates ASCII and binary STL files for manufacturing suitability: checks manifold integrity, inverted normals (correct threshold, not -0.99), degenerate triangles, duplicate faces, open/non-manifold edges, and minimum face count. Accepts a single STL file path as CLI arg and prints JSON {valid, issues, format, triangle_count, surface_area}.
